justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent misinterpreted "every other Tuesday at 15" as a single specific date (June 2nd, 2026) instead of a recurring pattern, which is a fundamental failure to understand the temporal expression.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent correctly identified the conflicting topics but then repeatedly asked for clarification on the appointment type and date/time, even after the user reiterated the recurring nature of the request.
